---
title: "paper title"

pub-authors:
  - list
  - of
  - authors
  - last
  - names
  - only

pub-year: year
date: YYYY-MM-DD
venue: "venue full name"
pub-type: type of publication (e.g., Empirical Article, Review Article, Book Chapter, Popular Writing)
pub-status: publication status (e.g., Published or Preprint)

pdf: filename.pdf
data:
code:
doi: ""

abstract: "Paper Abstract"

listing-page: false
format: html
---
